The '''Mindabaal Custom''' was a type of personal [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]]. Designed to meet the needs of individual customers, Mindabaal Customs had a reputation for flexibility.<ref name="Pirates & Privateers" /> In their stock configuration, they were not equipped with weapons; however, some customers would order armament installed, such as [[James Ortell Donovan]] did with the [[Jericho's Pride|''Royal Flower'']].<ref name="Smugglers of the Outer Rim">{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}}</ref>
